textByHash.0093831bee72ca01274202b31af7ae4b59eff5cc: There you go. Now get out, we don't like your sort around here.
textByHash.04a8ec723c465541e86907f009d94875db4bef53: Welcome to the Auburn Pub. Are you here to buy a drink?
textByHash.0af99e89e234737e04ea17a8ba948f93905438e5: A human in The Lost Pickaxe? My old pa would be fuming. Still, business is business I guess. What can I get you?
textByHash.0e6c4ade1d3a736877e0a07b97b408e02b3b19ab: Now get out of here, your sort isn't welcome in my bar.
textByHash.0eac0d39b916fa5821486ef6c0c269a4675a52ce: Thank you. I like to think we have one of the nicest pubs in all of Varlamore, not that I can take much credit myself.
textByHash.126fa413b5b53e31d8543d1729c24a0e324ff4bd: MARLEY?! Don't talk about that sorry state of a person in this establishment!
textByHash.13aca86e5792a80da27ba9d4574f38ad9a6daaa1: Didn't feel like a drink after all, huh? Well, stop by anytime, hero.
textByHash.15d505d6bcfc1616a998c9d787303d0bf546e3ec: Ok one Black Skull Ale coming up, 8 coins please.
textByHash.173826a1c3565c7fddf144772cce2e66e9d258e0: Welcome to the Sheared Ram. What can I do for you?
textByHash.17d3198eb8b3d3b58c2bdc971b8aabccdf87cd92: He was talking to some shifty looking wizard the other day. I don't know his name, but I'd recognise him if I saw him.
textByHash.1d3848ab9b9cbd19755c23da179983aafbc4f60a: Imafore had him executed as a traitor, but in doing so he lost the support of all of Nemus' troops.
textByHash.1e1737329b04f4924cea5e169c1862fd833757ec: ...but not surprised. He was a good customer...but I knew he would sell his sword arm and do many a dark deed if paid enough.
textByHash.1ec5912c1b7dc00d579179545f8003afe4c8f091: If I were you I'd get lost before someone takes a dislike to your face and removes it for you.
textByHash.1ef71139ba90a2359003ea3d9432cd06d7871779: The four diamonds of Azzanadra??? How came you to know of this?
textByHash.2084e123e6907a7b8af0cd33df1239457ada1c9a: I suppose you'll be wanting some Fire Brandy. That'll cost you 12 coins.
textByHash.221c06a61f07ec0251f4b2f661296e756fba0aee: Yeah, this belongs to 'Brentle Vahn', he's quite a common customer, though I've not seen him in a while.
textByHash.2612cef458ff6c76920c64554bbf44bcadeff4b2: You're going to have to pay 50 gold for the Uncle Humphrey's Gutrot.
textByHash.273b5a84536ac7ea82bf916738e77bc2ff95134c: General Nemus is something of a hero in these parts. Towards the end of the war, the forces of Kourend had mostly taken the Auburn Valley.
textByHash.281d3334e53abb0820428b921addc38cd3d23a5b: Well you know where we are if you change your mind.
textByHash.2824a07fac648f5f69d4b83c41cfb7e1b2130101: Welcome to Sunlight's Sanctum. What will it be?
textByHash.2aee17cd1410e1c673d0e55c808768422afc7387: Well, we're sat between two sets of mountains. Lots of places for accidents to happen.
textByHash.2c91ec70d9b7baa1e825559a2a1980b7d1f08e2e: Well, there's the sword shop across the road, or there's also all sorts of shops up around the market.
textByHash.2ceef1b85d81e7e57d52198ac3397479c8f9ef4a: Are you sure? You look a bit skinny for that.
textByHash.32b1a0b2fe9a3bd696f7a55be91bee5a91d53528: [laugh] time to be breaking out the old Supergrog. That'll be 15 coins please.
textByHash.33e34b91ede22684f272eeb2f293f9e82be0b0db: As a result, Imafore ordered General Nemus to burn the entire valley to the ground to stop the Kourend advance. Many would have died on both sides, but Nemus refused the order.
textByHash.362469dd559728bbbf910344b2661fac1fe57880: It's a sort of connection between magic boxes across the world, big boxes on people's desktops and little ones people can carry. They can talk to each other to play games.
textByHash.39a9817803d13efd67bb5d032767aef9259e9065: Like I said, we don't have a basement room. However, I do have a nice big one here on the ground floor that's available. It's 30 coins for the night.
textByHash.3a5955bfb6307dfb7b298a9ec315399646293341: A bad attack of sand? I think you're on the wrong track, mister so-called archaeologist.
textByHash.3a91093937eddd175554cf50bbacd15194141748: What can I do yer for?
textByHash.3ee5532353d755ce317e0d3d95f9b9ddccdb8aa9: Some local parents I think, but many faces come in here. I can't keep track of them all. Now, are you going to buy a drink?
textByHash.3f03f1b6ad5da6616f71656c6e25dbdd385bc42b: And why would a mourner be telling me this? Clear off!
textByHash.43317eafdb7afc0d7dcd596b9bce17177523498f: Well we have beer, or if you want some food, we have our home made stew and meat pies.
textByHash.45494dc7d86210edacb785bcb987995f1b2d01ff: Oooh, don't show me that sort of stuff, it's probably all magical and wizardy, probably turn me into a frog as soon as I look at it...
textByHash.468782318384d5a3bae424f1c609b50aed177732: Fancy a bit of Heart Stopper then do you? It'll only be 8 coins.
textByHash.4859eb9437f60342cdcaef4e9fdb263472f88ffa: Who's that? I mean, I guess it's a picture of a person isn't it? Sorry...you've got me? And before you ask, you're not putting it up on my wall!
textByHash.4883fbd98115700af7a0e1f7db117a9af36e7d71: Sure, that will be 2 gold coins please.
textByHash.493a30e095e4e8b694c5b997a3f9060c150ef7a3: One of the patrons here is looking for treasure apparently. A chap by the name of Veos.
textByHash.4abeaa77b1b104bf15e28f0f893bb5e671bb8f7c: Anyway, ever since the war ended, this place has remained here as something of a monument to Nemus. Of course, rather than a military camp, it now acts as a nice stop off for travellers such as yourself.
textByHash.4b01378125908d0add9dafb674a4fa4a18e25d62: So you're the fella that freed Azzanadra, huh? Fair play to ya. What will you have?
textByHash.4b1aaff411ba5584621c28bf43e1a4d5dac951cc: You don't represent the king! Clear off!
textByHash.4edbe8033d157d1f9a21834e47edba730aafcfc3: And on that note, I'm guessing you came in for a drink? What will it be?
textByHash.5069ce2f5815a915004f2d6fb1c9b19044f2b6b9: Hmmm, it's not really familiar to me, sorry I don't know what it's for, looks magical to me...maybe someone else in Yanille can help you?
textByHash.5122165d1c32187de4bf4f5e5a1547995338336a: And on that note, can I get you a drink?
textByHash.5429a1688126e9bb5e4f6e17e439005f16f23d4c: Knowing the goblins it could easily turn into a full blown war, which wouldn't be good. Goblin wars make such a mess of the countryside.
textByHash.57f540882600ec2a694100974f46dfb09ae4df0c: Oh yes, Brentle's tankard. Yeah, you've shown me this already. It belonged to Brentle Vahn, he was quite a common customer, though I've not seen him in a while.
textByHash.5a95eed6a7f616c56044b7c216660bbce55a349f: If you really want to hear more about it you'd be best off finding someone who cares about the past, and the history of this area, and stop bothering me.
textByHash.5aa825059cfa0a92a37ce98fcd602b8911bb53fc: Well it's the Moonrise Brewery and Winery who own this place. It's only as nice as it is because of their continued investments.
textByHash.5bebcd77b99e11ab7d5300570c31874d2b769eac: Thank you very much. The room is all yours. Enjoy!
textByHash.5fd285107eb3920697d07b0a578bb344427a89ee: Not a lot. Couple of kids that have run into trouble on some adventure no doubt, along with a few adults who decided to slip away in the night.
textByHash.6454b9ddc33d8a6aefd3df4b44e7dd944f562487: Two gold pieces a pint. So, what do you say?
textByHash.65fac26468cd31e575b92e9bbc5933700caecaf0: What's that? You wanna buy a beer? It'll cost ya 650 coins.
textByHash.671920279cb44879b08f1c60db990b5a08ba46be: Well, those posters aren't putting themselves on the notice board. You'll probably want to find whoever put them there.
textByHash.67fc2397b1aa581becdb85e227abb9160143a2e5: Good day to you, brave adventurer. Can I get you a refreshing beer?
textByHash.6a3b339d078ff2dc8ac5821eee94fa66df9e90e8: Nilsal, and welcome to Nemus Retreat. Can I get you a drink?
textByHash.6a8b2761cec9e88e1fa901e860f4454187899fcc: Good morning, what would you like?
textByHash.6de59bbc38f2d9678058bd8fc49a850e372ef3cd: Well, there was a guy in here earlier saying the goblins up by the mountain are arguing again, about the colour of their armour of all things.
textByHash.7105f9b374f84d2d4927687868a4c994c2ff61e7: It's just a fairy tale for children. Maybe one of the village elders might know more, but it's not really something I care about.
textByHash.72ef3dac7afb99d4ee8d25b90eb93a9c388abfd8: Don't get many humans in Stick Your Ore Inn. Are you here to drink?
textByHash.72fa2082f5df555c84c024ba57da5d6b3680178d: Oh really? Our inheritance is only sand and death. What do you expect to find out here in this desert forsaken by the gods?
textByHash.77115efe631b1fab7bfd5aa6401316f68a7303d5: Oh yes, this is Brentle's mug...I'm surprised he left it just lying around down some cave. He's quite protective of it.
textByHash.7fe3fa672b98eec417b9d3ef2f853fee055f128b: Hello there. Welcome to the Rolling Tide. What can I get for you?
textByHash.820a74e3e6605d5d57c9d7f7dad3c1d3eb4f688c: It's just to the east of the palace.
textByHash.8235d56bdc78f2a7479cc1db9df4d151364ec0ac: Ooh I don't know if I should be giving away information, makes the game too easy.
textByHash.86771c855ab13901a425b0abbd122eea784c1421: Ah, there seems to be a fair few doing that one these days. My supply of Olde Suspiciouse is starting to run low, it'll cost you 10 coins.
textByHash.8b536964c6d59d3aaa8bc23caa9c566fde6becc8: Come back when you're a little thirstier.
textByHash.900a8b380ab90d6295048a0bc054106e0eb91184: Welcome to The Flaming Arrow. What can I get for you?
textByHash.92be7ca191ecadec2f5f4439f614eec9dc8da9f3: Well I suppose it just makes sense for them. Keeping this pub in good condition keeps the locals happy, which is probably wise for a company that employs half of them.
textByHash.97c225847c39fcece08b2e8a304c81fb373c9725: Oh you're a barbarian then. Now which of these barrels contained the Liverbane Ale? That'll be 18 coins please.
textByHash.9a214e5fb53e4f7b88c5dc918c5527f8366d0515: So you're just lurking here? Pa always said your kind were freaks.
textByHash.9e974813123cc1581ea1616e40a3caf57b4fc486: Beer tax? My patrons work hard for the city of Ardougne! They come here to unwind after a long day. This is plain disrespect to the work they do!
textByHash.a04513847576d6d33ffae5c6efc32359eb5da840: You'd better clear off before I make you.
textByHash.a1d97cf6d93c05623e06d36c80507e87f2e2b965: I'm not that well up on the gossip out here. I've heard that the bartender in the Blue Moon Inn has gone a little crazy, he keeps claiming he is part of something called an online game.
textByHash.a23dc7a29f08d8d6799f85224ec05042f182ed5e: Indeed. Imafore presumably hoped to make an example of Nemus, but instead his decision was one of the final mistakes that ultimately led to his defeat a few months later.
textByHash.a5abc6e33fb0c024aca91cde59c537269e05bea2: Not that I think it's any of your business, but when I was a child I remember hearing the legend.
textByHash.a6b9671fde9a9e7dfe10d06f8624eed75c101452: You ain't got the 650 coins it costs to buy it, and I'm glad 'cos I didn't want to serve you anyway.
textByHash.a8a9c13944609f4c1f53c2247da7d15d8c20e2f6: Get out of my bar then! We don't like your sort round here!
textByHash.a90965fbfb22e6cb87a3f99c02ab263203de5709: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.
textByHash.aa30d0c2a20771a030f2bbfa74adfefca927801b: Oh no not another of you guys. These barbarian barcrawls cause too much damage to my bar.
textByHash.ac9fede688b0334de4089df91ad6bc649f2c26c8: One beer coming up. Ok, that'll be two coins.
textByHash.b3a69c0a91fe1a9b2c7c46b04bd103ad73aff53f: Get out of here. I have nothing to say to the likes of you.
textByHash.b41a7ca495659f63a552ef16a9abe819ef7c55f5: We don't have a basement room... but I do have a nice big one here on the ground floor that's available. It's 30 coins for the night.
textByHash.b5b6e909a08a0eee20153160419dcf49b93f4811: The perfect selection for any sailor!
textByHash.b9bd681466ceaf436a44834097e26ba4972cafc5: Like I told you, you'll want to find whoever put those posters up. I think it was some local parents. Now, are you going to buy a drink?
textByHash.ba11bb3bc65064518ba9370f3d104fc97b9ed5e4: Anyway, did you want to buy a drink?
textByHash.bb4e6d96327bf4b9384b3e79b783593b1fe34834: Go and talk to the bartender at the Jolly Boar Inn, he doesn't seem to mind giving away clues.
textByHash.be933789924b785fcfcf8db0980e979344918426: I don't recall it particularly well, other than they are said to contain an incredible power.
textByHash.bf420e9898d2655de6f391616a7e0095c4cc777e: You haven't heard the last of this!
textByHash.bf437bd151b0e1bedadcfe75ee5d2f9b0ab8a23b: Ok, that'll be two coins please.
textByHash.bfa6b7cfc507524affb27e4296439e97e7f28ce4: I couldn't tell you to be honest. They've been here for a very long time. Apparently they came in quite useful during the war, and these days they do help stop any undesirable beasts wandering into town.
textByHash.c529fd5756a9f7e2a29e5f431e7d7d8b852dd7f3: We also make plenty of money from all the tourists. Even before Varlamore opened up, Aldarin was a top holiday destination. That's easy money for the owners to help fund all their other ventures.
textByHash.c5a701bd29666fe8e0bad6e97348e9b0dfcc6048: Like I said, this is Nemus Retreat. Back during the War of Betrayal, this was a military camp for Imafore's army, run by none other than General Nemus himself!
textByHash.c782ae1e75457a981a0d2027e797074e0b89128d: Dragon Bitter and Greenman's Ale, oh and some cheap beer.
textByHash.c88a468bc316a108062af5d196a8f8680295bbfd: Ah, looking to find them, are you?
textByHash.ce71782156d1995a311feec15426684eedebabcf: What that means, I don't know. That's probably old news by now though.
textByHash.d2cb102d443c0afad8dad0ec66f0e909761395a7: If you're not buying anything, I have nothing to say to you.
textByHash.d314eef075a21020daaaad997977e964526be4cc: Ok then, that's two gold coins please.
textByHash.d433d419b1ee8373c7b6528cd4534a1071f4d900: Well then I'm not really sure what we have for you. Perhaps you should be on your way.
textByHash.d475cb995dd2181e7d1f81b8fec2723112bff60e: Would you like to buy a drink?
textByHash.dbbf70a53bd78290681bba8cdd6daa4ea82b65d7: Not at all, just doing my part.
textByHash.dd3e25ee1cfe3feb77b9cbce030f5bfb752334f5: Well you know where we are if that changes.
textByHash.e245468aa90e01f56828891dfb0db4c69e9f3815: Let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.e563df9c0957791e34e210539dde6bf3e9aeedfc: If you need help bringing the culprit to justice, you let me know.
textByHash.e740b74d451a8ffae824dfa90899ee85e657e190: Get out of here, we don't like your sort in these parts.
textByHash.e79840dc74fc1b5f1fbd456d0278ee92470877a0: Yeah, that's the guy who was talking to Brentle Vahn the other day! Look at those eyes, never a more shifty looking pair will you ever see!
textByHash.eb404a338c87e07b34a70326d1fbe4e05e5986c6: You've had your drink, now get out of here. I have nothing to say to the-
textByHash.ec5b724140f798588762959eb4d5bf2a67c32ee7: So you're the lass that freed Azzanadra, huh? Fair play to ya. What will you have?
textByHash.ecd66fa9d126fc336317347dfdfac5f4e4f58e3e: Well there is the Varrock sewers. There are tales of untold horrors coming out at night and stealing babies from houses.
textByHash.edcb92d8f12e2ebfd8bb459b48608e0fd85f4c9d: Doubt it. What in the world would someone need to guard against in the middle of this desert?
textByHash.ee7bbbfc702c69aa5235064fd7ce8d0697457139: You don't have enough room for it.
textByHash.ee8c46657154e778ed3a03a3077b55c31e659a8b: Welcome to the Windbreaker. We've got the best drinks around.
textByHash.eea8adf95ac6eb35aea1880a43188110dcc7e473: Look around pal. Does it looks like there's any treasure near here?
textByHash.efff828c5064bc0e1e3f55948ba3e6138b603334: One grog coming right up, that'll be three coins.
textByHash.f0e77b8ffbc02601125326fa61acd830d26e50c2: I'm sorry, I really am, but I just don't see it...can you make a better picture?
textByHash.f1b8079b1461e10aa15db1902cdb0edca6edd4f8: This world around us... is an online game... called Old School RuneScape.
textByHash.f465efeac666661eb69d889a525bed11fb0bdd6f: A bowl of stew, that'll be 20 coins please.
textByHash.fd5410248929d6fa04f7bbf4e427dad1e9922226: Yohoho me hearty what would you like to drink?
